summary: Code review of AquaLife (WaterLlama-like water tracker, Turkish UI, AsyncStorage offline). All required testIDs are present in onboarding.tsx, home.tsx, stats.tsx, achievements.tsx, settings.tsx. Backend not exercised (offline app per spec). UI testing was not executed due to token budget constraints in this iteration; recommend a follow-up testing run with Playwright on https://drink-buddy-14.preview.emergentagent.com using mobile viewport 390x844.

issues: Quick add bar has 5 items in narrow row; on 375px screen icon wraps may be tight (52px circles + flex:1) — verify visually

action_items: Run Playwright UI flow: onboarding (5 steps -> Başla) -> home -> add-water-250 -> verify daily-percent updates -> stats -> achievements (achv-first_drop unlocked) -> settings (add-cup-btn modal -> confirm-add-cup) -> reload page to verify AsyncStorage persistence and onboarding skip.
Verify backend GET /api/ returns Hello World via curl (offline app, but endpoint exists).
Confirm WaterWave component animates and rises with progress (visual).
critical_code_review_comments: calculateGoal rounds to nearest 50ml: 70kg -> 2450ml (not 2500). Onboarding default state shows 2500 then overwrites to 2450 on Devam Et — minor UX inconsistency.

AppContext.persist uses stale `state` in closures (addDrink/removeEntry/updateSettings/etc rely on captured state, not functional updates). Rapid taps could cause race conditions / lost writes. Recommend functional setState pattern.
frontend/.env uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (correct for Expo) — no backend usage in app, OK.
home.tsx > 350 lines; consider splitting Modal & QuickButton into separate files.
settings.tsx onAddCup: parseInt('300') OK but no upper bound validation; negative/huge values accepted.
Switch component (toggle-reminders) on web preview may not be tappable via Playwright force click — use page.click on parent role=switch.
All text properly wrapped in <Text>; StyleSheet.create used; testIDs present on all interactive elements per spec.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Token budget exhausted before Playwright execution. All testIDs verified present in source. Next agent should: (1) curl https://drink-buddy-14.preview.emergentagent.com/api/ for backend smoke; (2) Playwright on same URL with viewport 390x844, complete onboarding via testIDs (onboarding-weight-input, onboarding-next-btn x4, then 'Başla'), then home flow add-water-250 and verify daily-percent text changes from 0% to ~10%, then test settings add-cup-btn -> new-cup-name + new-cup-amount + confirm-add-cup -> verify cup-{id} appears on home. Persistence: page.reload() should keep entries and skip onboarding (onboarded flag in AsyncStorage key 'aqualife_state_v1').
